name: Pamela Tondreau
background: Pamela Tondreau has served as our Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since September 2021. Prior to joining the Company, she served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation.
